title: MBA / PGDM Jobs 2026 – Section In Charge
location: Andaman and Nicobar Island, Andaman and Nicobar Island
shortInfo: The Andaman & Nicobar Islands Institute of Medical Sciences (ANIIMS) has released an official recruitment notification for the post of Section In-Charge .for candidates with qualifications in MPH, MBA. can apply offline before the last date, 15 June 2026, by submitting the application form to the prescribed address mentioned in the official notification.

basic_details.job_title: ANIIMS Section In Charge Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline
basic_details.organization_name: Andaman & Nicobar Islands Institute of Medical Sciences
basic_details.short_information: The Andaman & Nicobar Islands Institute of Medical Sciences (ANIIMS) has released an official recruitment notification for the post of Section In-Charge .for candidates with qualifications in MPH, MBA. can apply offline before the last date, 15 June 2026, by submitting the application form to the prescribed address mentioned in the official notification.
basic_details.job_location: Andaman and Nicobar Island, Andaman and Nicobar Island

age_limit.details: Candidates who are interested in applying for the ANIIMS Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form.

qualification.education_qualification: Post graduate in Finance or Hospital Administration or equivalent from any recognized Institute, Master's in Business Administration
qualification.details: Post graduate in Finance or Hospital Administration or equivalent from any recognized Institute. Desirable: Master's in Business Administration from any recognized Institute.

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: https://aniims.andamannicobar.gov.in/.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 15-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for the ANIIMS Section In-Charge recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application for the ANIIMS Section In-Charge post is 15th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the concerned authority before this deadline.

faq.question: What is the educational qualification required for the Section In-Charge position?
faq.answer: Candidates must possess a postgraduate degree in Finance or Hospital Administration or an equivalent qualification from a recognized institute. A Master's in Business Administration is considered desirable.

faq.question: What is the age limit for the Section In-Charge post?
faq.answer: The minimum age requirement is 18 years, and the maximum age limit is 38 years. Specific age relaxations are applicable for male and female candidates.

faq.question: Is there any application fee for the ANIIMS Section In-Charge recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) in the official notification for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: What is the salary offered for the Section In-Charge role?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Section In-Charge position will receive a consolidated salary of Rs. 40,000 per month.

faq.question: How will candidates be selected for the Section In-Charge post?
faq.answer: The selection process for the Section In-Charge post involves two main stages: scrutiny of applications received and a subsequent interview for shortlisted candidates.

faq.question: What is the mode of application for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application process for the ANIIMS Section In-Charge recruitment is strictly offline. Candidates need to download the form, fill it, and send it to the official address.

faq.question: Which organization is conducting this recruitment?
faq.answer: This recruitment is being conducted by the Andaman & Nicobar Islands Institute of Medical Sciences (ANIIMS).

faq.question: What is the nature of the job?
faq.answer: The job is offered on a contract basis for the Section In-Charge position at ANIIMS.

faq.question: Where can I find the official notification and application form?
faq.answer: The official notification and application form can be downloaded from the official website of ANIIMS, the link for which is provided in the 'Important Links' section of this article.
